mapper.insert:
insert into supfusion_i18n_resource ( id , i18n_key , i18n_value , langu_code , module_code , module_version_code , valid , creator , modifier , create_time , modify_time ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.i18nKey}, #{item.i18nValue}, #{item.languCode}, #{item.moduleCode}, #{item.moduleVersionCode}, #{item.valid}, #{item.creator}, #{item.modifier}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.modifyTime} )
mapper.select:
select count( i18n_key ) from ( select i18n_key from supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE 1=1 and valid = '1'
AND i18n_key LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_key},'%')
AND langu_code = #{langu_code} AND i18n_value LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_value},'%')
group by i18n_key ) AS T2

SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE supfusion_i18n_resource . valid = '1'
AND i18n_key LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_key},'%')
AND langu_code = #{langu_code} AND i18n_value LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_value},'%')
GROUP BY supfusion_i18n_resource .i18n_key ORDER BY supfusion_i18n_resource.modify_time DESC
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select count( i18n_key ) from ( select i18n_key from supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE 1=1 and valid = '1'
AND i18n_key LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_key},'%')
AND i18n_value LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_value},'%')
group by i18n_key ) AS T2

SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE supfusion_i18n_resource . valid = '1'
AND i18n_key LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_key},'%')
AND i18n_value LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_value},'%')
GROUP BY supfusion_i18n_resource .i18n_key ORDER BY supfusion_i18n_resource.modify_time DESC
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT id , i18n_key , i18n_value , langu_code , module_code , module_version_code , valid , creator , modifier , create_time , modify_time FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE supfusion_i18n_resource .valid = '1' AND i18n_key in
#{i18n_key}

select id , i18n_key , i18n_value , langu_code , module_code , module_version_code , valid from supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE 1=1
AND module_code = #{moduleCode} and langu_code = #{languCode} and valid = '1'

SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE supfusion_i18n_resource . valid = '1' AND
i18n_key LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_key},'%')
GROUP BY supfusion_i18n_resource .i18n_key ORDER BY supfusion_i18n_resource.modify_time DESC
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select count( i18n_key ) from ( SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE supfusion_i18n_resource . valid = '1' AND
i18n_key LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_key},'%')
GROUP BY supfusion_i18n_resource .i18n_key ) AS T2

SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE supfusion_i18n_resource . valid = '1'
AND i18n_key LIKE concat('%',#{i18nKey},'%')
AND langu_code = #{languCode}
AND
i18n_value LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_value},'%')
GROUP BY supfusion_i18n_resource .i18n_key

SELECT count(i18n_key) FROM ( SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE supfusion_i18n_resource . valid = '1' AND i18n_key LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_key},'%') GROUP BY supfusion_i18n_resource .i18n_key ) AS t

SELECT i18n_key FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE supfusion_i18n_resource . valid = '1' AND i18n_key LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_key},'%') GROUP BY supfusion_i18n_resource .i18n_key
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT count(i18n_value) FROM ( SELECT i18n_value FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE supfusion_i18n_resource . valid = '1' AND langu_code = #{langu_code} AND i18n_value LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_value},'%') ) AS t

SELECT i18n_value FROM supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE supfusion_i18n_resource . valid = '1' AND langu_code = #{langu_code} AND i18n_value LIKE concat('%',#{i18n_value},'%')
limit #{offset}, #{limit}

select id , i18n_key , langu_code , i18n_value from supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE 1=1
AND i18n_key = #{i18nKey} and valid = '1'

select id , i18n_key , i18n_value , langu_code , module_code , module_version_code , valid , creator , modifier , create_time , modify_time from supfusion_i18n_resource WHERE 1=1
AND i18n_key = #{key} and valid = '1'
